mapper.sql: s.my_schedule_id, s.title AS sch_title, s.start_at, s.is_shared, p.title AS place_title, p.addr1, p.first_image, v.visit_order
FROM my_schedule s JOIN visit_item v ON s.my_schedule_id = v.schedule_id JOIN place p ON v.place_id = p.place_id
mapper.select:
SELECT
WHERE s.user_id = #{userId} UNION ALL SELECT
JOIN schedule_share_user ssu ON s.my_schedule_id = ssu.my_schedule_id WHERE ssu.shared_user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY start_at DESC, visit_order ASC

SELECT
WHERE s.user_id = #{userId} UNION ALL SELECT
JOIN schedule_share_user ssu ON s.my_schedule_id = ssu.my_schedule_id WHERE ssu.shared_user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY sch_title ASC, visit_order ASC

SELECT
WHERE s.user_id = #{userId} AND s.is_shared = 1 UNION ALL SELECT
JOIN schedule_share_user ssu ON s.my_schedule_id = ssu.my_schedule_id WHERE ssu.shared_user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY start_at DESC, visit_order ASC

SELECT
WHERE s.user_id = #{userId} AND s.is_shared = 1 UNION ALL SELECT
JOIN schedule_share_user ssu ON s.my_schedule_id = ssu.my_schedule_id WHERE ssu.shared_user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY sch_title ASC, visit_order ASC

SELECT
WHERE s.user_id = #{userId} AND (s.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')) UNION ALL SELECT
JOIN schedule_share_user ssu ON s.my_schedule_id = ssu.my_schedule_id WHERE ssu.shared_user_id = #{userId} AND (s.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')) ORDER BY start_at DESC, visit_order ASC

SELECT
WHERE s.user_id = #{userId} AND (s.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')) UNION ALL SELECT
JOIN schedule_share_user ssu ON s.my_schedule_id = ssu.my_schedule_id WHERE ssu.shared_user_id = #{userId} AND (s.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')) ORDER BY sch_title ASC, visit_order ASC

SELECT
WHERE s.user_id = #{userId} AND s.is_shared = 1 AND (s.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')) UNION ALL SELECT
JOIN schedule_share_user ssu ON s.my_schedule_id = ssu.my_schedule_id WHERE ssu.shared_user_id = #{userId} AND (s.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')) ORDER BY start_at DESC, visit_order ASC

SELECT
WHERE s.user_id = #{userId} AND s.is_shared = 1 AND (s.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')) UNION ALL SELECT
JOIN schedule_share_user ssu ON s.my_schedule_id = ssu.my_schedule_id WHERE ssu.shared_user_id = #{userId} AND (s.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')) ORDER BY sch_title ASC, visit_order ASC

SELECT
WHERE s.user_id = #{userId} AND s.is_shared = 1
AND (s.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
UNION ALL SELECT
JOIN schedule_share_user ssu ON s.my_schedule_id = ssu.my_schedule_id WHERE ssu.shared_user_id = #{userId}
AND (s.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY sch_title ASC, visit_order ASC ORDER BY start_at DESC, visit_order ASC
SELECT CONCAT('S', LPAD(NEXTVAL(seq_my_schedule), 3, '0'))
SELECT CONCAT('P', LPAD(LASTVAL(seq_schedule_post), 3, '0'))
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO my_schedule (my_schedule_id, title, start_at, user_id, is_shared) VALUES (#{myScheduleId}, #{title}, NOW(), #{userId}, 0)
INSERT INTO visit_item (visit_item_id, visit_order, schedule_type, place_id, schedule_id) VALUES (NEXTVAL(seq_visit_item), #{visitOrder}, 'SCHEDULE', #{placeId}, #{scheduleId})
INSERT INTO schedule_share_user (share_id, permission, my_schedule_id, shared_user_id) VALUES (NEXTVAL(seq_schedule_share_user), 'R', #{myScheduleId}, #{sharedUserId})

INSERT INTO schedule_post (post_id, title, budget_details, todo_details, is_anonymous, view_count, like_count, posted_at, user_id) SELECT CONCAT('P', LPAD(NEXTVAL(seq_schedule_post), 3, '0')), title, budget_details, todo_details, #{isAnonymous}, 0, 0, NOW(), #{userId} FROM my_schedule WHERE my_schedule_id = #{myScheduleId}

INSERT INTO visit_item (visit_item_id, visit_order, distance_to_next, schedule_type, place_id, schedule_id) SELECT NEXTVAL(seq_visit_item), visit_order, distance_to_next, 'POST', place_id, CONCAT('P', LPAD(LASTVAL(seq_schedule_post), 3, '0')) FROM visit_item WHERE schedule_id = #{myScheduleId}
mapper.select: SELECT my_schedule_id AS myScheduleId, title FROM my_schedule WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY start_at DESC, my_schedule_id DESC

SELECT v.visit_item_id, v.visit_order, p.place_id, p.title FROM my_schedule s JOIN visit_item v ON s.my_schedule_id = v.schedule_id JOIN place p ON v.place_id = p.place_id WHERE v.schedule_id = #{scheduleId} ORDER BY v.visit_order ASC

SELECT p.title, v.visit_order, p.mapx, p.mapy, v.distance_to_next FROM my_schedule s JOIN visit_item v ON s.my_schedule_id = v.schedule_id JOIN place p ON v.place_id = p.place_id WHERE s.my_schedule_id = #{scheduleId} ORDER BY v.visit_order ASC
SELECT u.user_id, u.name, u.email, ssu.permission FROM schedule_share_user ssu JOIN users u ON ssu.shared_user_id = u.user_id WHERE ssu.my_schedule_id = #{myScheduleId}
